topics.title: Leslie West and The Who Collaboration
topics.summary: The studio explores a rare recording of Leslie West performing lead guitar on a cover of Marvin Gaye's "Baby Don't You Do It" for the band The Who.

topics.title: Trauma and Childhood Fear
topics.summary: The studio explores the psychological impact of a traumatic childhood filled with stories of family tragedy, leading to an enduring fear of medical procedures and the outside world.

topics.title: Personal Fears and Childhood Influence
topics.summary: The studio explores the impact of childhood experiences, personal anxieties regarding safety in public spaces, and the dynamics of emotional intimacy within relationships.

topics.title: Comedy Bits and Sirius Satellite Radio Growth
topics.summary: The show features a series of comedic segments involving interrupted phone calls followed by a discussion regarding the significant subscriber growth and market position of Sirius satellite radio.

topics.title: Comic-Con Interviews and Academic Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a series of interviews with Comic-Con attendees in costume, followed by a discussion regarding an intern's lengthy academic path and the history of professional storytellers.

topics.title: Comic Book Culture and Star Wars Fan Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments involving listeners in costume, discussions on comic book lore regarding characters like Grodd, and humorous exchanges about Star Wars fandom.

topics.title: Las Vegas Escorts and Howard TV Content
topics.summary: The studio discusses a local escort's reaction to being featured in an article about her encounter with J.D., the calorie content of Artie’s snacks, and various segments on Howard TV.

topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the production of upcoming media projects, discusses listener feedback regarding specific callers like Ralph and John the Stutterer, and reacts to a controversial television scene involving a nun.

topics.title: Sean Hannity and Guest Caller Debates
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Sean Hannity's public persona and various callers debating the inclusion of a controversial regular caller named Ralph.

topics.title: Radio Show Feedback and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio reviews listener feedback regarding a guest's performance, discusses the behavior of Paula Abdul in media appearances, and shares anecdotes about local events.

topics.title: Paula Abdul and Celebrity Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses Paula Abdul's public behavior, her professional career hurdles, and various celebrity news items including the investigation of Senator Ted Stevens.

topics.title: Caller Dynamics and Guest Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses the merits of a recent guest, the health concerns of a regular contributor, and whether to limit the airtime of a polarizing but honest caller.

topics.title: NFL Coach Bill Walsh Tribute
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legacy of football coach Bill Walsh, his West Coast Offense, and various clips of coaches reacting to games.

topics.title: Sports Commentary and News Segment
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including sports performance critiques, marijuana health studies, legal cases involving organ harvesting and drug possession, and reports on the death of an NBC news producer.

topics.title: Current Events and Pop Culture Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a segment covering international relations between the U.S. and Great Britain, a tragic home invasion in Connecticut, Barry Bonds' baseball records, and various upcoming comedy tours.
